block_00: Aapka pahchaan dastaavej jald hi samaapt ko jaayega
block_02: Hum aapko yah suchit karne ke liye sampark kar rahe hain ki aapko pahchaan ka pramaan
block_04: din(dinon) me samaapt ho jayega aur aapka account satyaapit nahin kiya jaa sakega. Anti-money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Law ke tahat money laundering aur terrorist financing ki roktham aur daman ke liye yah company ki vaidh jimmedaari hai ki yah pratyek trader se pahchaan ke navinatam aur vaidh pramaan ka anurodh kare aur use apne paas banaaye rakhe.
block_05: Isliye, aapse anurodh hai ki hamen nimnalikhit me se ek pradaan karen:
block_10: Dastaavej ek purna prishth hona chahiye, rangeen, dhundhla nahin, aapke naam par jaari kiya gaya aur maanya (jaise samaapt nahin hua ho).
block_11: Hum aapke sahyog ki saraahana karte hain aur aapke liye uplabdh rahte hain.
block_16: Yadi aapke paas koi prashna hai to humari
block_18: ko aapki madad karne me khushi hogi.
